Module 5:
Tennis Ninja PLC 3 & 4
!
Executive Summary
Will essentially split his PLC #3 into two videos - these two videos are
shorter than PLC #1 and #2. If you go with 4 pieces you can foreshadow
the offer in that 4th video.
Conventional wisdom is to use 3 videos but this works too.
!
PLC #3
• 	This video starts much stronger - big promise in the beginning
• 	Strong statement: “We are mere mortals, but we just need to understand
the strategy pro’s use”
• 	The first 1:20 of this video is brilliant - study this and adapt it for your own
launch
• 	This is a “shortcut story” - many of us are selling this too
• 	Goes back to the studio (teaching) - refers back to past videos
• 	“Most people do X, you could do Y.”
• 	13 minutes of teaching
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 1 of 3 --

• 	Comes back to creating authority for himself
• 	Ends with CTA (call to action)
!
PLC #4
• 	Begins by teaching against conventional wisdom (this is an instant hook)
• 	Offers some specific tactics to handle yourself like the pro’s do
• 	Social proof: thank you for the comments, there have been over 1000
comments and “my eyes hurt from reading them”
• 	Transitions into why you have to pay attention to online teaching, why
strategy matters - notice that this is a foreshadow for his course
• 	Foreshadows offer and makes the transition
• 	You have to make a decision on how much you want to foreshadow
the offer in your last PLC video
• 	This is more typical if you do a 4th piece of PLC content
• 	This is not the normal style - you could just have the first 3 video’s
and end it with…
• 	“I loved making these videos, I’m glad it’s been impactful. I know
some of you want to take it a step further. In my next video I’m going
!
2	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 2 of 3 --

to be explaining my upcoming training and how you can take this
further.”
• 	Makes the promise of what the entire course/program will offer
• 	Strong guarantee - “steal our stuff” and we’ll still give you a refund
• 	Revelation of price - this is where you finally expose the price of the
product
• 	Delivers bonuses and also includes a mystery bonus
• 	CTA (call to action)
• 	You do want to hint that an offer is coming - Will was very explicit and
revealed a lot of this in his final PLC
!
Key Lessons Learned
Typically you want to do 3 PLC videos - but this is flexible
Study the first 1:20 of Will’s PLC #3 - this can be transferred into your
launch easily, especially if you are selling a “shortcut”
Hint that there is an offer coming - ideally you don’t want to expose the
offer details like Will did (this is an advanced strategy)
!
